title: QA: Verify I6 delegation non-escalation enforcement
intent: Verify that I6 enforcement is correct, complete, and cannot be bypassed. The delegation graph must be sound and the gate must deny all escalation paths.
acceptance_criteria: Delegation to agent with matching capability succeeds
Delegation to agent without matching capability is denied
Transitive delegation (a→b→c) does not escalate beyond c's own capabilities
Empty delegation graph means no delegation is possible
Decision log correctly records delegation deny with reason
I6 holds under module composition — adding modules does not weaken delegation bounds
